{{Quote|The HoloNet relay at Horska did indeed still have their records for transmissions from this area just after that raid against us.|[[Mavron]]|<ref name="VOTF" />}}
'''Horska''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]]. It was location of an [[Imperial Remnant]] [[HoloNet relay/Legends|HoloNet relay station]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Vision of the Future]]'' {{Ab|Vision of the Future (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1stm|in book}}
